dataset_name: Cortex Air Mode - Block E Aircraft Fit / ULD / Door Dimensions
purpose: Mock/reference aircraft fit and ULD dataset for Cortex air-mode R&D readiness checks.
legal_note: R&D/mock reference only. Aircraft fit must be validated by carrier/loadmaster, aircraft W&B manual, cargo loading manual, ULD compatibility, floor loading, CG, restraint and station procedures before operational use.
integration_note: Use Block E after Block A/B/C/D. If cargo is HEA/BIG/OHG/ACT/BUP or exceeds passenger-belly limits, run aircraft/ULD fit rules and cap confidence unless final station/loadmaster confirmation exists.
recommended_next_research: RKN/RAP official Envirotainer datasheets with max gross weights
operator-specific ULD compatibility by aircraft registration/configuration
floor loading and restraint tables by aircraft position
